productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Black Kurta
description: Style Notemother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian kurta. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers.Product DetailsKurta with black print, has a stand collar with slit neckline, mock placket with decorative fabric buttons, three quarter length sleeves and no vents at hemMaterial and Care100% cottonGentle hand wash cold using mild detergentDo not scrub or bleachDry inside outCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
